params.prompt: Create a single premium mobile app UI asset: a horizontal sci-fi XP core progress bar frame for UNBOUND. Aspect ratio 3:1. Style: brutalist Japanese minimalism, cold black graphite metal, cyan/blue internal energy, segmented capsule with precise tick marks, subtle teal glow, high contrast, no words, no numbers, no logos, no characters. Centered on near-black background. The bar should look like a custom game reward module, not a generic web progress bar. Crisp edges, app UI ready, plenty of dark padding, 2D/3D hybrid, restrained but powerful.
